Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: R. Edwards. M. Chin, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Heidi C. Taylor, Esq. for Petitioner: Shelley Scholnick present as Guardian ad litem for: Fiona Welch (present), Dorothy Welch (present) and Waylon Welch ( not present), all minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petitions are granted and compromises are approved.
See orders approving compromise for Attorney's Fees; Medical Expenses; and Costs.
A net balance of $4,699.64 to be depositted into a blocked account with Bank of America, La Brea-Rosewood Branch, Los Angeles, CA., for each minor individually and separately; and no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
